action: I advance toward the nearer skeleton and bring my longsword down in a wide arc, pouring holy wrath into the blow
weapon_or_spell: longsword with Divine Smite (1st level spell slot, 3d8 radiant vs undead)
movement: move south toward skeleton_2 as far as needed to reach melee range
notes: Using Divine Smite on hit to maximize damage against undead. If movement doesn't bring me into melee, will close the distance; if I reach melee, will attack and expend the slot on impact.
